loop1.title: Cumulative Energy
loop1.note: Showing total active and reactive energy for this month — per-phase breakdown is not measured for this aggregate panel.

loop1.title: Energy Consumption Trend
loop1.note: Showing total active energy trend for 23 PRIMARY feeders; rated/contracted reference lines omitted (nameplate unknown); UPS/BPDP/HHF sub-legend slots omitted (no matching members).

loop1.title: Today live power analysis
loop1.note: Showing live apparent power and active/reactive breakdown for the panel's outgoing feeders; capacity and peak markers are omitted because the panel's rated kVA is unknown.

loop1.title: Daily Power Demand by Feeder
loop1.note: Showing aggregated power demand by feeder group (UPS, FCBC, AHU) — per-group breakdown is not measured by a single column, resolved via panel member fan-out.
